ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "key_validity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of key validity in days */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Activation status of the application */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User who created the application */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "eff_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application became effective */,
  "upd_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the application */,
  "upd_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "eff_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_pairs" (
  "key_pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key pair */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the applications table */,
  "public_key" TEXT /* Public key */,
  "private_key" TEXT /* Private key */,
  "key_validity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of key validity in days */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Activation status of the key pair */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User who created the key pair */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key pair was created */,
  "eff_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key pair became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_pair_history" (
  "key_pair_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key pair history */,
  "key_pair_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the key_pairs table */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the applications table */,
  "public_key" TEXT /* Public key */,
  "private_key" TEXT /* Private key */,
  "key_validity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of key validity in days */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Activation status of the key pair */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User who created the key pair */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key pair was created */,
  "eff_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key pair became effective */,
  "upd_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the key pair */,
  "upd_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_pair_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the applications table */,
  "key_pair_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the key_pairs table */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g. create, update, delete) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User who performed the activity */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_roles" (
  "application_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application role */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the applications table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User who created the application role */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application role was created */,
  "eff_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application role became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_pair_rotation" (
  "key_pair_rotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key pair rotation */,
  "key_pair_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the key_pairs table */,
  "rotation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of key pair rotation (e.g. daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "next_rotation_date" TEXT /* Date of next key pair rotation */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User who created the key pair rotation */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key pair rotation was created */,
  "eff_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key pair rotation became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_pair_rotation_id")
)
